---
title: "E-Commerce Platform"
date: 2026-05-15
tags: [fullstack, react, node.js, mongodb]
link: "https://github.com/username/ecommerce"
image: "https://via.placeholder.com/400x250?text=E-Commerce"
description: "A full-stack e-commerce platform with React frontend and Node.js backend. Features include product catalog, shopping cart, and payment integration."
---

## Project Overview

This is a comprehensive e-commerce platform built with modern web technologies. The platform provides a seamless shopping experience with an intuitive interface and robust backend infrastructure.

## Features

- **Product Catalog**: Browse and search products with filters
- **Shopping Cart**: Add, remove, and manage cart items
- **User Authentication**: Secure login and registration
- **Payment Processing**: Integrated payment gateway
- **Order Tracking**: Real-time order status updates
- **Admin Dashboard**: Manage products, orders, and users

## Tech Stack

- **Frontend**: React, Redux, Material-UI
- **Backend**: Node.js, Express, MongoDB
- **Deployment**: AWS, Docker

## Achievements

- ✅ 10,000+ monthly active users
- ✅ 99.9% uptime
- ✅ <2s average page load time
- ✅ 4.8/5 star rating

[View on GitHub](https://github.com/username/ecommerce) | [Live Demo](#)
